title: OpenAI and NVIDIA Announce Strategic Partnership to Deploy 10 Gigawatts of NVIDIA Systems
summary: OpenAI and NVIDIA are partnering to deploy 10 gigawatts of AI datacenters powered by NVIDIA systems, with the first phase launching in 2026.
why_included: This partnership between OpenAI and NVIDIA is significant for AI infrastructure, involving a substantial deployment of computing power to support advanced AI development.

title: OpenAI and NVIDIA Announce Strategic Partnership
summary: OpenAI and NVIDIA announce a strategic partnership to deploy 10 gigawatts of AI datacenters powered by NVIDIA systems, with the first phase launching in 2026.
why_included: This partnership between OpenAI and NVIDIA involves a massive infrastructure deployment for AI datacenters, indicating significant growth and investment in AI compute.
